name: AppTech Corp.
summary: AppTech Corp., a financial technology company, provides electronic payment processing technologies and merchant services in the United States. Its merchant services offer financial processing for businesses to accept cashless payments, such as credit cards, automatic clearing house, and wireless payments. The company's merchant services software offers integrated solutions, such as data encryption, payment tokenization, issuing banking authorization, and the creation of white-label and merchant-specific mobile applications for friction less digital and mobile payment acceptance, including acceptance of alternative payment methods, as well as multi-use case, multi-channel, API-driven, and account-based issuer processing for card, digital tokens, and payment transfer transactions. It is developing mobile payment platform relies on SMS text messaging. AppTech Corp. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Carlsbad, California.
